audit_result.proof_trace: VerifyDataColumnSidecar checks len(kzg_commitments) > 0 and length consistency, but does NOT validate len(kzg_commitments) <= MaxBlobsPerBlock(epoch). Nodes accept oversized data column sidecars violating the blob schedule limit (6/9/12 depending on epoch).
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker gossips data column sidecar with 100 KzG commitments exceeding max_blobs_per_block. Nodes process and store invalid oversized columns, causing memory/CPU exhaustion and potential DoS.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-009.text: kzg_commitments count must not exceed max_blobs_per_block for the sidecar's epoch.
